<!-- 13 clusters · 237 confirmed cluster findings + 93 cross-cutting · severity {'high': 13, 'medium': 91, 'low': 196} -->

# V4 Design-System Audit — Final Report (Liquid Terminal Frontend)

## Executive Summary

**Overall state.** The V4 migration is **substantially complete on structure but not on finish**. Every page renders on the V4 shell, layout primitives, and token vocabulary; tsc and ESLint are green and `knip` runs clean against an entry-point allowlist. But the audit surfaces a long tail of **token-level drift** (raw `emerald/rose/amber/zinc/white-opacity` instead of `success/danger/gold/surface-*`), a cluster of **un-migrated detail pages** (transaction/perp/perpdex/spot error states still on pre-V4 glass + `text-white`), and **pervasive hand-rolling of primitives that already exist** (KpiRibbon, PillTabs/TimeframeTabs, OverviewModule card-head, Skeleton, `timeAgo`/`compactUsd`/`formatPrice`).

**The "migration complete" claim does NOT fully hold.** The shell and routing migration is done, and ESLint/tsc/knip are green — but those gates only validate markup and hex-in-`className`, not (a) raw Tailwind palette classes (`emerald-400` etc. are valid Tailwind, so lint passes), (b) `rgba()` in inline styles / chart props, or (c) primitive reuse. The audit found **3 confirmed ship-blocker-class HIGH defects that the gates cannot see** (an illegible `bg-gold text-gold` badge, a fabricated "Last tx: 1h ago" metric, and an emoji placeholder on the landing CTA), plus several whole pages still on pre-V4 patterns. Verdict: **"V4 structure complete, V4 finish ~85%."**

**The 3-5 biggest themes:**
1. **Off-palette directional/status colors** — by far the most common finding. `emerald/rose/amber/red/green/purple/cyan` used where `success/danger/gold/brand` tokens exist. Concentrated in market/tracker, explorer, wiki, and the common-primitive directional helpers. Lint-invisible because they are valid Tailwind classes.
2. **Hand-rolled primitives that already exist.** KpiRibbon (6+ hand-rolled stat strips), PillTabs/TimeframeTabs (~8 hand-rolled selectors, several with duplicated framer-motion sliders), OverviewModule card-head (~6 explorer/v4 cards), Skeleton (17 `animate-pulse` blocks), and the `<Card>` shell (xp + profile panels).
3. **Duplicated formatters/helpers.** `formatPrice` ×5, `formatFunding` ×3, `timeAgo`/`formatRelativeTime` ×4, `compactUsd`, plus 3 `date-fns` direct imports — all with canonical SSOTs in `@/lib/formatters`.
4. **Un-migrated surfaces.** Pre-V4 glass error cards (`bg-surface/60 + rounded-2xl + text-white`) on transaction/perp/perpdex/spot pages; hand-rolled spinners instead of `LoadingState`/`InlineSpinner`; native `confirm()` for user delete; `bg-white/x`/`bg-black/x` surface-opacity drift across tracker dialogs.
5. **Three token-image primitives still coexist** (`TokenAvatar`/`AssetLogo`/`TokenIcon`) and a **rejected `FormModal`** still ships with a false JSDoc — both hidden from knip by the `common/**` entry-point allowlist.

**Severity tally (confirmed, intentional excluded):**
- **HIGH: 11** — TwapTable emerald ramp; LiquidationsStatsCard; LiquidationsChartSection; transaction detail page; StakingTableContent illegible gold badge; perpdex stat strip; AuctionCard; BuildersGlobalStatsStrip; PortfolioStats fake metric; ImportWalletsCSVDialog; CsvUpload (ecosystem); ReviewModal; CsvUpload + FormModal-dead-code.
- **MEDIUM: ~52**
- **LOW: ~85** (incl. ~74 mechanical knip dead-code/unlisted-dep entries)

(Counts exclude the 30+ `intentional:true` accepted items listed at the end.)

**Authoritative baseline (cite before remediation):** `pnpm run lint` green, `pnpm run build`/tsc green, `knip` clean against `knip.json` (note: `common/**` is an entry point — it masks the dead `FormModal`, legacy `DataTable`, `StatsPanel`, `ScrollableTable`). One unlisted dep: `postcss-load-config`.

---

## 1. Forgotten Migrations
Pages/components still on pre-V4 patterns (`not-migrated`, plus the un-migrated chart/chrome surfaces).

### HIGH

**Explorer subpages**
- `src/app/(app)/explorer/transaction/[hash]/page.tsx:52-102` — entire page is pre-V4: `text-white`/`text-white/50` throughout, raw `text-red-500`/`text-green-500` status icons, hand-rolled back button + raw `<h1>` instead of `PageHeader`, `bg-surface/90` hash card. Fix: `PageHeader` + `<Card>` (solid `bg-surface`), `text-text-primary/secondary`, `text-danger/success`, `ErrorState`/`EmptyState`.

**Market: perp / perpdex / auction**
- `src/app/(app)/market/perpdex/[dex]/page.tsx:136-238` (+82/243/260/285) — six hand-rolled `bg-surface/60 backdrop-blur-md border-white/5 rounded-2xl shadow-xl` stat tiles where the DS mandates a single `<KpiRibbon>`; pervasive `text-white` values. Worst offender in the cluster. Fix: one `<KpiRibbon cells={…}/>` + `<Card>` wrappers.

### MEDIUM

**Market: spot + token detail**
- `src/app/(app)/market/spot/[token]/page.tsx:88-89` — hand-rolled `animate-spin` ring while `ChartSkeleton` is already imported. Fix: `<LoadingState>`/`<Skeleton>`.
- `src/app/(app)/market/spot/[token]/page.tsx:98-99` — pre-V4 glass error card (`bg-surface/60`, `border-white/5`, `rounded-2xl`, `text-white`). Fix: `<Card>` + `text-text-primary`.
- `src/components/market/token/OrderBook.tsx:108-186` — order-book / trades panels are hand-rolled `grid-cols-3` markup with manual header rows. Fix: extract a depth-row primitive or render via `ModuleTable` (depth bars are an acknowledged special case — document if kept bespoke).
- `src/app/(app)/market/perp/[token]/page.tsx:85-86` — token-not-found card on pre-V4 glass + `text-white`. Fix: `<Card>` + `text-text-primary` (mirror the `[dex]` fix; consider a shared not-found primitive).
- `src/components/market/auction/AuctionCard.tsx:45,70,110` — hand-rolled spinner, `bg-white/10` progress-track fill. Fix: `<LoadingState size="sm">`, track → `bg-surface-2`.

**Market: hip4 + builders** (timeframe selectors — collapse: **three** hand-rolled timeframe selectors duplicating `TimeframeTabs`/`PillTabs`)
- `src/app/(app)/market/builders/[address]/page.tsx:78-90`, `src/app/(app)/market/builders/intelligence/page.tsx:61-78`, `src/app/(app)/market/builders/page.tsx:55-77` — Fix all three → `<TimeframeTabs>`.
- Hand-rolled `animate-pulse` skeleton grids → `<SkeletonGrid>`/`<StatsCardSkeleton>`: `BuilderDetailStatsGrid.tsx:28-34`, `BuilderIntelligenceKpis.tsx:19-25` (byte-identical), `[address]/page.tsx:95-103` (also uses `bg-white/5` placeholders → `<SkeletonCard avatar>`).
- `src/app/(app)/market/builders/[address]/page.tsx:122-143` — hand-rolled 3-cell stat strip though `KpiRibbon` is imported on the same page (L163). Fix: `<KpiRibbon>`.

**Market: tracker**
- `src/components/market/tracker/stats/PortfolioStats.tsx:149,202-225` — whole panel is raw `bg-surface/60 + rounded-2xl`; balance rows are `bg-surface/60` tiles. Fix: `<Card padding="md">`, inner tiles → `bg-surface-2`.
- `src/components/market/tracker/stats/PerformanceChart.tsx:36,39,51,76` — `bg-surface/60 rounded-2xl` wrapper + hand-rolled `bg-black/30`/`bg-white/[0.06]` pill tabs. Fix: `<Card>` + `<PillTabs>`.
- `src/components/market/tracker/assets/AssetsTable.tsx:243,272-283` — `TypedDataTable` used (good) but the shell is `bg-surface/60 rounded-2xl` with `bg-white/10` dividers + `bg-white/5` hover; Type/PnL/Funding cells use raw emerald/rose. Fix: `<Card>`, dividers → `border-subtle`, hover → `surface-2`, cells → `Column.type:"change"`.
- `src/components/market/tracker/walletlists/UnifiedWalletSelector.tsx:306-327` — bulk-delete is a hand-rolled `AlertDialog` (rounded-2xl) with `bg-rose-500` destructive buttons + `text-white`. Fix: `<DeleteConfirmDialog>` + `variant="destructive"`.
- `src/components/market/tracker/AddToTrackListButton.tsx:76,89-101,121` — tracked-state button uses `emerald-*`; login modal is a hand-rolled fixed overlay (`bg-surface/80 backdrop-blur rounded-2xl`) instead of `<Dialog>`; `text-black` CTAs. Fix: `<Dialog>`, `text-success`, `text-brand-text-on`.
- `src/app/(app)/market/tracker/my-wallets/page.tsx:56-147` — auth gate is a hand-rolled fixed overlay; `text-white`/`text-white/50` headings; empty Orders/TWAP cards use `border-2 border-brand/30`. Fix: `<Dialog>` + `<Card>` + semantic text tokens.

**Common primitive health**
- `src/components/dashboard/chart/MultiSeriesAreaChart.tsx` — documented as a shared primitive but lives in the dashboard domain folder; `market/spot/SpotMarketShape.tsx:13` reaches cross-domain to import it. Fix: relocate to `common/charts/`, export from the common barrel, update import sites.

**User admin**
- `src/components/user/UserManagement.tsx:89-90` — native `confirm()` for user delete; `<DeleteConfirmDialog>` exists in `@/components/common`. Fix: replace with the primitive.

**Wiki + ecosystem**
- `src/components/ecosystem/project/modal/tabs/CsvUpload.tsx:63-148` (HIGH — see §4 for the color half) — hand-rolled `animate-spin` spinner. Fix: `<InlineSpinner>`/`<LoadingState>`.
- Hand-rolled spinners → `InlineSpinner`/`LoadingState`: `wiki/forms/CsvUploadForm.tsx:70`, `wiki/CategorySidebar.tsx:122`, `explorer/validator/chart/UnstakingScheduleChart.tsx:104-124` (also `text-red-400`/`text-white/40`), `explorer/address/VaultDepositList.tsx:115-121`, `app/page.tsx:25`.

### LOW

**Service-arch (read-hook plumbing — collapse: 6 GET-and-display hooks hand-roll `useState/useEffect/fetch` instead of `useDataFetching`)** — MEDIUM each per verdicts, grouped here for brevity:
- `services/wiki/hooks/usePendingResources.ts`, `useMySubmissions.ts`, `usePendingCount.ts` (manual `setInterval` → `refreshInterval`), `services/wiki/readList/hooks/usePublicReadLists.ts`, `services/market/tracker/hooks/useWalletLists.ts`, `services/xp/hooks/useXpLeaderboard.ts` (LOW — infinite-scroll partial justification). Fix: rebuild read paths on `useDataFetching`; keep mutations/append manual.
- `services/wiki/api.ts:134-145` (MEDIUM) — `submitResource` is the only API fn not wrapped in `withErrorHandling`. Fix: wrap body (keep `apiClient.post` for the rate-limit headers).

**Tracker / explorer / misc low-sev not-migrated**
- `market/tracker/home/PublicListsPreview.tsx:27-49` + `TrackedWalletsPreview.tsx:32-127` — hand-rolled `px-6 py-4` card-heads instead of the V4 `CardHeader` card-head; `rounded-2xl` icon wells; `bg-surface/40` tiles.
- `app/(app)/explorer/liquidations/page.tsx:14-25` — `gap-8` grid, no `PageSection`/`SectionHead`, and **double-wraps** `LiquidationsStatsCard` (which already renders a `StatsPanel` Card) in another `<Card>`. Fix: `PageSection`, `gap-4`, drop the outer Card.
- `dashboard/twap/TwapTable.tsx:58,121` — pre-V4 `text-sm`/`text-xs`/`font-mono` instead of explicit px + `.mono`.
- `ecosystem/publicgoods/PublicGoodsCard.tsx:85-126` + `ecosystem/project/ProjectCard.tsx:68-98` (LOW per verdict) — inline `<Image onError>` avatars + `hover:bg-white/5`. **Note the verifier flagged the `TokenAvatar` fix as INAPPLICABLE** (TokenAvatar resolves the HL token CDN, has no `src` for arbitrary user logos). Net fix here is only `hover:bg-white/5 → bg-surface-2`; a real shared user-logo avatar primitive does not yet exist.
- `landing/SectionsEditorialPremium.tsx:253` — **emoji placeholder `📊`** as a screenshot thumbnail on the landing "See it in action" grid (`screenshots[]` carries no image src). Ship-blocker-class but low blast radius. Fix: real `<Image>` or a lucide icon.

## 2. Forgotten Deletions
Dead code / orphans / superseded primitives still present (`dead-code`).

### HIGH

- `src/components/common/modal/FormModal.tsx:57` — **rejected primitive still shipping.** `docs/CODEMAP.md:83` lists it as "Deliberately rejected: generic form-modal base — over-abstraction." Zero real consumers (grep `<FormModal`/`import { FormModal` = 0); its own JSDoc *falsely* claims ProjectModal/ProjectFormModal/UserEditModal/EducationModal use it — all of those import raw `@/components/ui/dialog`. Invisible to knip only because `common/**` is a knip entry point. Fix: delete the file + `modal/` folder + the barrel `export * from './modal'`.

### MEDIUM

- `src/components/common/DataTable.tsx:141` — legacy non-generic `DataTable` function has zero consumers (the barrel re-exports only the `Column`/`ColumnType` *types*); all 44 page tables use `TypedDataTable`. Fix: remove the `DataTable` function, keep `TypedDataTable` + types + cell helpers; consider renaming file to `TypedDataTable.tsx`.
- `src/components/common/TokenIcon.tsx` — superseded "cyan circle" glyph with exactly **one** remaining consumer (`market/tracker/assets/AssetsTable.tsx:55,119`). Fix: migrate those two cells to `<TokenAvatar>`, then delete (the `getTokenIconUrl` helper stays). *(Light variant `bg-white`/`text-black` is flagged intentional — legacy-but-kept — see accepted note.)*
- `src/components/common/StatsPanel.tsx` — legacy header-icon stat container; sole consumer `LiquidationsStatsCard.tsx`, vs 9 consumers of the V4 `StatsCard`. Still wires the pre-V4 `LoadingState`/`ErrorState`. Fix: re-implement `LiquidationsStatsCard` on `StatsCard`, then delete `StatsPanel` + its type.

### LOW

- `src/components/common/ScrollableTable.tsx` — only importer is the soon-dead `DataTable.tsx`; becomes a true orphan once legacy `DataTable` is removed. Fix: delete alongside it.
- `src/components/Header.tsx:10` — `customTitle` prop declared in `HeaderProps`, never destructured/used; the single call site (`(app)/layout.tsx:30 <Header />`) passes nothing, so `searchPlaceholder`/`searchWidth` defaults are also dead config. Fix: drop `customTitle` (consider inlining the other defaults).
- `src/components/market/tracker/assets/hooks/index.ts` — empty barrel (`export {};`) re-exported via `assets/index.ts` while siblings are imported directly. *(Flagged intentional placeholder — see accepted note; functionally harmless.)*

**Knip-reported dead exports (mechanical, all LOW — collapse: ~74 entries).** Unused functions/hooks/types confirmed by knip + grep. Delete-if-truly-unused sweep:
- **Unused functions/hooks:** `safeUrl.ts:50 isSafeHref`, `auth/user/api.ts:34 _fetchAdminUser`, `common/hooks useParamsFetch` (+ impl), `dashboard/hooks useChartTimeSeriesData`/`useFeesChartData` (+ impls), `ecosystem/project/api.ts` (`updateProject`, `deleteProject`, `assignProjectCategories`, `removeProjectCategories`, `fetchProjectCategories`), `explorer/address/utils.ts:107 formatHip2Display`, `explorer/hooks useTransfers` (+ impl), `explorer/liquidation/api.ts:32 fetchLiquidations`, `useLiquidationsHistoricalChart` (+ barrel), `explorer/priority-fees/api.ts:232 fetchPriorityFeesGossipHistory`, `explorer/validator/staking-holders.ts:35 fetchTopHolders`, `indexer/evm/api.ts` (`fetchEvmStats`, `fetchEvmStatsDaily`, `fetchEvmBlocks`, `fetchEvmTransactions`, `fetchEvmLedgerTransfers`), `indexer/overview/api.ts:23 fetchDailyVolume10d`, `market/auction/api.ts:132 fetchTokenAuction`, `useLatestAuctions` (×2 barrels), `market/order/api.ts` (`fetchLatestTwapOrders`, `fetchUserTwapOrders`), `market/perpDex/api.ts` (`calculateGlobalStats`, `fetchPerpDexByName`), `market/tracker/walletlist.service.ts:163 updateWalletListItem`, `xp/types.ts:201 DAILY_LIMIT_LABELS`.
- **Unused exported types:** `explorer.types.ts` (`ActivityTab`, `AddressBalanceProps`, `AddressHeaderProps`, `TabNavigationProps`), `auth/user/types UseAdminUserResult`, `common UseParamsFetchOptions`/`BasePagination`, `ecosystem/project/types` (`UpdateCategoryInput`, `UseUpdateProjectResult`, `UseDeleteProjectResult`, `UseProjectCategoriesResult`), `explorer/liquidation` (`HistoricalChartPoint`, `LiquidationStatsAllResponse`, `LiquidationChartDataResponse`), `priority-fees UsePriorityFeesGossipHistoryResult`, `validator/types` (`HolderResponse`, `UseTopHoldersResult`, `StakingValidationsResponse`), `vault/types` (`VaultDetailsRequest`, `VaultDetailsResponse`), `indexer/evm/types` (`UseEvmStatsResult`, `UseEvmBlocksResult`, `UseEvmTransactionsResult`, `UseEvmLedgerTransfersResult`), `perpDex/types` (`PerpDexParams`, `UsePerpDexsOptions`), `wiki/linkPreview/types` (`LinkPreviewParams`, `LinkPreviewListResponse`), `wiki/types ReportsResponse`, `xp/types LimitedActionType`.
- **Unlisted dependency:** `postcss.config.mjs:1 postcss-load-config` — add to `devDependencies`.

## 3. Missed Factorizations
Duplicated logic a primitive already covers (`factorization`).

### MEDIUM

**Hand-rolled KpiRibbon (the single SSOT stat strip)**
- `explorer/validator/ValidatorStatsCard.tsx:60-83` — `KpiItem[]` rendered as a hand-rolled tile grid → `<KpiRibbon cells={…}/>`.
- `market/perpDex/PerpDexStatsCard.tsx:82-112` — 6-up grid + bespoke `DeltaPill` → `<KpiRibbon … columns="grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-6">` (tone via `KpiCell.tone`).
- `market/tracker/home/TrackerStatsBar.tsx:88-110` — 3-up `StatsCard` grid → `<KpiRibbon>`.

**Hand-rolled aurora/pill selectors (duplicate PeriodSelector aurora / PillTabs)**
- `explorer/validator/chart/ValidatorChartSection.tsx:43-106` (two toggles) and `ValidatorChartTabs.tsx:27-54` — byte-for-byte aurora pill markup; file already imports `PeriodSelector`. Fix: `<PeriodSelector variant="aurora">` (icon-label toggle may need a small prop extension).
- `explorer/liquidation/LiquidationsChartSection.tsx:108-183` — two framer-motion `layoutId` pill groups → `PillTabs` (custom `ChartPeriod` strings, so generic `PillTabs`, not `TimeframeTabs`).

**Formatters / date helpers (canonical SSOTs in `@/lib/formatters`)**
- `formatPrice` ×5: `market/token/{OrderBook:31,RecentTrades,TokenCard}.tsx`, `tradingViewChart/chart-helpers.ts`, `perpDex/PerpDexMarketsTable.tsx` → `formatPrice` from `numberFormatting.ts:156`.
- `timeAgo`/`formatRelativeTime` ×4: `xp/XpHistoryList.tsx:59-78`, `market/tracker/home/ActiveUsersPreview.tsx:17-29`, `hip4/Hip4StalenessChip.tsx:12-19` (`formatAge`), and the two date-fns wallet-list cards below. Fix: `timeAgo` from `dateFormatting.ts:13` (note output differs: `5m` vs `5m ago` — adjust call site).
- `date-fns` direct imports (3): `tracker/walletlists/PublicWalletListCard.tsx:9` + `PublicWalletListPreviewDialog.tsx:28` (`formatDistanceToNow` → `timeAgo`), `explorer/transaction/TransactionHeader.tsx:2` (`format` → `formatDate`).
- `market/tracker/stats/PortfolioStats.tsx:48-59` — local `formatAbbreviated` K/M/B → `compactUsd`.

**WebSocket dedup (larger refactor — flagged intentional/deferred, see accepted note)**
- `market/{token,perpDex,hype}/websocket.service.ts` — three services hand-roll reconnect/backoff (~542 lines) instead of `lib/websocket-client.ts WebSocketClient`. CODEMAP marks this a dedicated medium-high-risk PR.

### LOW

**OverviewModule card-head re-rolled on raw `<Card>` (collapse: ~6 explorer/v4 cards)**
- `explorer/v4/CapitalEvolution.tsx:75-85,199-219`, `LiveActivity.tsx:158-184,255-281`, `BridgeTransfers.tsx:79-100`, `TokenDeploys.tsx:29-44`, `UpcomingUnstaking.tsx:60-79`. The identical `flex … px-3.5 py-2.5 border-b border-border-subtle` + `w-6 h-6 rounded-md bg-brand/10` + `text-[13px] font-semibold` head is emitted verbatim by `OverviewModule`. Fix: compose `<OverviewModule>`. **Caveat:** `LiveActivity` (LivePill + StreamToolbar) and `BridgeTransfers` (two tag pills) need a small action-slot / multi-node tag extension on OverviewModule first; `TokenDeploys`/`UpcomingUnstaking` map 1:1.

**Hand-rolled `<Card>` shell + icon-head (xp + profile)**
- `xp/XpHistoryList.tsx:106`, `XpLeaderboard.tsx:101`, `XpBadge.tsx:116-123`, `DailyTasksWidget.tsx:104-109`, `WeeklyChallengesCard.tsx:111-116`, `XpEarnGuide.tsx:93-98`, `profile/page.tsx:240,352` (same file already uses `<Card>` at L140). Fix: `<Card>` (+ `padding`/`interactive` CVA) + V4 card-head.

**Builders column factory (larger-ish refactor)**
- `market/builders/{BuildersTopTable,BuildersAllTable,BuilderUsersTable,BuilderIntelligenceUsersTable}` — 4 tables redefine ~70%-overlapping `buildColumns()` (rank / avatar-name / volume / fees / users). Fix: extract a shared `builderColumns` factory with per-table overrides.

**Other primitive consolidations**
- `<Skeleton>` not used: 17 `animate-pulse` files (LiquidationsStatsCard, AddressHero, Hip4QuestionCard, BuilderDetailStatsGrid, etc.) → `Skeleton`/`SkeletonCard`/`SkeletonGrid`.
- `<Num>` not used: ~16 files hand-style standalone numbers (`mono text-gold`/`mono text-text-primary`) outside ModuleTable cells (VaultMetadataCard, VaultConcentrationBar, VaultDetailHeader, BuildersFlowChart, etc.) → `<Num>`. **Exclude ModuleTableRow cells — those spans are the documented cell idiom** (the CODEMAP ~27 figure double-counts them; real targets ~16).
- `OverviewModule + ModuleTable + ModuleTableRow` not used: `TwapPanel`, `Hip4OutcomesCard` (local `OutcomeRow` at L38 → common `<OutcomeRow>`), `XpLeaderboard` hand-built rows.
- Inline `<Image onError>` + `imageError` state ×5: `wiki/ResourceCard.tsx:130-144`, `ecosystem/project/ProjectCard.tsx:93-98`, `ProjectHeader.tsx:26-31`, `PublicGoodsCard.tsx:86-91`, `readList/ReadListItemCard.tsx:57-64`. *(Same TokenAvatar-inapplicability caveat as §1 for the user-logo cases.)*
- `market/token/RecentTrades.tsx:16-82` — local `formatPrice/formatSize/formatTime` + raw emerald/rose + `bg-white/5` + hand-rolled `grid-cols-4` (same legacy pattern as OrderBook).
- `ecosystem` creation modals — `ProjectFormModal` vs `ProjectModal` duplicate wizard scaffolding; the active-tab `TabsTrigger` className is copy-pasted **8×**. Fix: shared `<WizardTabs>`/`ModalTabsTrigger`. Also `PublicGoodsCard.tsx:111-117` inlines the status→variant ternary that `ProjectStatusBadge` already provides.
- `common/forms/CategoryForm.tsx:54-98` — re-rolls `<FormField>` + `<FormFooter>` (same forms/ folder). Fix: compose them (~30 lines removed).
- `common/AssetLogo.tsx:16` — third token-image primitive; hardcodes the HL CDN URL instead of `getTokenIconUrl`. Fix: route through the central helper (or fold into TokenAvatar) and migrate its 2 callers.
- `Shell/Landing` — `Sidebar.tsx:20-25` and the landing header both define separate `socials` arrays with a byte-identical inline Twitter SVG path (= `landing-icons.tsx XIcon`). Fix: one shared social-links constant + `SocialIcons` set in `common/`.
- `xp/XpHistoryList.tsx:129` fallback `bg-zinc-400/10`, `XpLeaderboard.tsx:92` silver `from-zinc-400/10` — raw zinc chrome (not gamification hue) → token surfaces.
- `services` `any`: `wiki/api.ts:29` and `ecosystem/project/api.ts:25` use eslint-disabled `Record<string, any>` adapters. *(Flagged intentional — see accepted note; trivial swap to `Record<string, unknown>`.)*

## 4. Chart / Token Compliance
Token / radius / primitive / hard-rule adherence (`chart-violation`).

**Clean:** the USDH cluster is V4-clean apart from one `bg-white/5` chip (below). Chart *canvas* colors (lightweight-charts series, AuroraAreaChart ticks via `chartColors`) are correctly on the documented chart carve-out. `MultiSeriesAreaChart`'s tooltip is the canonical `rounded-lg` + `chartColors` reference the other findings measure against.

### HIGH

**Dashboard**
- `dashboard/twap/TwapTable.tsx:82-84` — progress ramp uses `bg-emerald-500/400/300`; the migrated sibling `UserTwapTable` uses `bg-danger/bg-gold/bg-success`. Fix: mirror the token ramp.

**Explorer + liquidations**
- `explorer/liquidation/LiquidationsStatsCard.tsx:47-158` — pervasive `rose/emerald/amber/purple` for long/short/fees/avg/max. Fix: directionals → `success/danger`, fees-adjacent amber → `gold`, meaningless `purple-400` → `text-text-primary`, card icon → `StatsPanel iconVariant="accent"`.
- `explorer/liquidation/LiquidationsChartSection.tsx:93-175` — chart *chrome* (series is fine via chartPalette): `rose/emerald` ambient glow, `bg-black/30` tab containers, `bg-white/[0.06] ring-white/10` active pill, `rose` period accents. Fix: `surface-2`/`surface-3`, `danger`/`brand`, retokenized glow.

**Explorer subpages**
- `explorer/address/staking/StakingTableContent.tsx:237` — **legibility bug:** Commission badge is `bg-gold text-gold border-gold` (solid gold fill + gold text = invisible). Fix: `bg-gold/12 text-gold border-gold/25` (mirror the delegation branch); delegation `emerald-400 → success`.

**Market: perp / perpdex / auction**
- `market/auction/AuctionCard.tsx:25-115` — `red/emerald/amber/yellow/green` for error/status/live-dot + a three-stop gradient progress bar. Fix: `danger/success/gold`; solid token bars (`bg-danger`/`bg-gold`/`bg-success`) not gradients.

**Market: hip4 + builders**
- `market/builders/BuildersGlobalStatsStrip.tsx:62-97` — full hand-rolled 4-up KPI strip + local `DeltaPill` duplicating `KpiRibbon`. Fix: `<KpiRibbon>`, delete `DeltaPill`. *(dual-category: also a factorization HIGH.)*

**Market: tracker**
- `market/tracker/stats/PortfolioStats.tsx:184` — **fabricated metric** `Last tx: 1h ago` (hardcoded literal, no data binding) — violates the no-fake-data rule. Fix: remove or wire `timeAgo(lastFill.time)`.
- `market/tracker/ImportWalletsCSVDialog.tsx` — densest drift in the codebase: `gray-400`, `green-400`, `red-400`, `zinc-800/50`, `red-950/20 border-red-900/30`, `black/20`, `white/5`, `text-black` (lines 204-340). Fix: full token sweep (`text-text-tertiary`/`success`/`danger`/`surface-2`/`danger` tints/`brand-text-on`).

**Ecosystem**
- `ecosystem/publicgoods/ReviewModal.tsx:64-135` — `emerald/rose`-as-success/danger approve/reject, `bg-black/20` panels, `bg-surface/60` dialog, `text-white` on solid buttons. Fix: `success`/`danger` tokens, `surface-2`, solid `bg-surface`. *(Caveat: the `rounded-2xl` sub-claim is NOT a defect — it matches the base `ui/dialog` default.)*
- `ecosystem/project/modal/tabs/CsvUpload.tsx:63-148` — `red/green/yellow`-### result blocks + `text-black` + `bg-surface/50`. Fix: `danger/success/gold` tokens, `brand-text-on`, `surface-2`.

### MEDIUM
(grouped by cluster; representative — fixes are the same token mapping `emerald→success`, `rose→danger`, `amber/yellow→gold`, `purple/cyan→brand`, `white-opacity→surface-2`, `rounded-2xl/xl→rounded-lg` unless noted)

**Shell / Landing**
- `landing/SectionsEditorialPremium.tsx:19-152` — **10 inline `rgba()`** brand/gold/bg gradients bypass the lint hex rule (it scans `className`, not inline styles). Fix: drive off `rgb(var(--brand-accent-rgb)/…)`, `rgb(var(--gold)/…)`, `var(--bg-base)`. Note the header fade `11,14,20` (#0B0E14) is **not** `--bg-base` (#08101A) — also a hardcoded value.
- `CustomizeSidebarModal.tsx:84,102` (LOW per verdict — downgraded from medium) — Switch unchecked track `bg-slate-500` (slate not in V4). Fix: `bg-surface-2`.

**Explorer subpages** — `block/[number]/page.tsx:43-44` (raw `text-red-500` error block → `ErrorState`), `block/BlockTransactionList.tsx:41` (neutral action badge wrongly `emerald` → neutral `surface-2` pill or `StatusBadge`), `address/AddressTransactionList.tsx:119,253` (`rounded-2xl` + `bg-surface/60` + `bg-white/10` hover), `address/AddressHero.tsx:93-147` (hand-rolled `animate-pulse` skeleton + `emerald` Tracked badge + `bg-white/5`), `address/staking/StakingTabButtons.tsx:16,24` (hand-rolled tabs + non-token `bg-white/4` → `PillTabs`).

**Market** — `market/perpdex/[dex]/page.tsx:85-185` (`text-white` headings/values + `emerald/rose` LIVE/OFFLINE), `market/token/OrderBook.tsx` (multiple, see §1), `market/builders/[address]/page.tsx:55-138` (6× `text-white`), `BuilderIntelligenceKpis.tsx:52,54` (neutral KPI wrongly `emerald` → `brand`), `BuilderDetailStatsGrid.tsx:24` (`rose` error → `danger`, sibling uses the token).

**Tracker** — `TrackerStatsBar.tsx` (`purple/cyan/emerald` icons → `brand`/`success`), `stats/PortfolioStats.tsx:231-285` (hand-rolled timeframe row + `emerald/rose` long/short + `bg-white/5`), `performance/PerformanceSection.tsx:96-117` (`emerald/rose` badge+glow), `walletlists/PublicWalletListCard.tsx` + `PublicWalletListPreviewDialog.tsx` (`emerald` Public label + `bg-zinc-800/30` rows + `bg-black/20`), `walletlists/CreateWalletListDialog.tsx:84-152` (`rounded-2xl/xl` + `emerald` toggle + Switch `bg-zinc-600`), `AddWalletDialog.tsx` (`rounded-2xl` + `text-black` + **stale "5/5" copy** while the real limit is 25 — fix the literal too).

**Ecosystem** — `publicgoods/PublicGoodsCard.tsx:47-219` (`blue/purple/zinc/amber/emerald`-### status & support icons), `ProjectContent.tsx:113-142` (support icons), `ProjectInfoSidebar.tsx:36,108` (`indigo-500` Discord icon — no brand-discord token exists, map to `brand`; `rose` delete → `danger`), `project/modal/tabs/ProjectForm.tsx` (`bg-white/5`/`rose`/`rounded-xl`/`bg-white/5` dividers), `modal/tabs/ProjectTab.tsx:174-239` (`rounded-xl` frames + `bg-rose-500 text-white` remove buttons).

**Wiki** — the **SSOT** `wiki/resource-status-config.ts:12-26` uses `amber/emerald/rose` (fix here propagates to ResourceCard + moderation → `gold/success/danger`); `MySubmissionsList.tsx:10-91` (local `statusConfig` duplicates the SSOT *and* carries the same off-palette — fix by importing the config); `moderation/WikiModerationCard.tsx:74-188`, `readList/ReadListItemCard.tsx:83-127` + `ReadListContent.tsx:155-178` (`emerald` read-state, `text-white` check → `brand-text-on`), `forms/CsvUploadForm.tsx:76-122`, `ReportResourceModal.tsx:59-111`, `UserSubmissionForm.tsx:106` (amber rate-limit → `gold`), `ResourceCard.tsx:113,189` (rose destructive hovers).

**Profile + XP** — `profile/TelegramLinkCard.tsx` (`rose` error-state lines 63-183 → `danger`; `emerald` linked-state lines 161-172 → `success`; `DailyTasksPopover` already proves the migrated `text-success` path).

**User admin / HIP-4** — `user/UserTable.tsx:50-195` (`rose`/`emerald`/`zinc-700`/`zinc-800/50`/`zinc-600` — zinc is explicitly banned), `user/UserManagement.tsx:217-232` (Admins `rose`, Verified `emerald` StatsCard icons; Moderators already `gold`), `user/UserEditModal.tsx:44-123` (`rounded-xl` inner chips + `bg-zinc-700` Switch + `bg-white/5`), `hip4/Hip4ApiDocBlocks.tsx:106` + `Hip4InfoApiToc.tsx:18,41` (**undefined `brand-primary` token → renders nothing**; fix → `surface-2`/`ring-offset-base`), `hip4/layout.tsx:20,22` (`text-white` h1).

### LOW
(directional green/red, copy-check icons, white-opacity hovers, single radii — collapse by pattern)

- **Copy-confirm `text-green-500`/`text-emerald-400` → `text-success`** (collapse, 8+ sites): `explorer/block/BlockHeader.tsx:43,77,103`, `dashboard/twap/TwapTable.tsx:133`, `explorer/address/VaultDepositList.tsx:85`, `validator/StakersTable.tsx:84`, `market/token/HoldersTable.tsx:91`, `tracker/fills/WalletRecentFillsSection.tsx:99`, `wiki/EducationContent.tsx:453`, **ui/ primitives** `copy-button.tsx:37` + `address-display.tsx:67` (real token swap even though in ui/).
- **Chart-tooltip `rounded-xl → rounded-lg`**: `dashboard/RevenueChart.tsx:444`, `dashboard/StablecoinsCard.tsx:485` (both also `bg-base/95` vs canonical `bg-surface/95`).
- **Recharts axis ticks hardcode `rgba(255,255,255,0.45/0.06)`** (not lint-caught): `StablecoinsCard.tsx:390,397,403` + `RevenueChart.tsx:345,352,358` → `chartColors.textMuted`.
- **Directional `emerald/rose` price/PnL/side colors → `success/danger`** (collapse, many): `vaultValidatorSum/TableContent.tsx:130,459`, `priority-fees/PriorityFeesKpiRow.tsx:77,87` + `PriorityFeesHistoryTable.tsx:76-184` + `PriorityFeesLeaderboardCard.tsx:81,93` + `priority-fees/page.tsx:31` (rose error banners — shared inline-error-pill factorization opportunity ×3), `address/orders/OpenOrdersList.tsx:31-32`, `UserTwapTable.tsx:129` (track `bg-white/10`), `address/cards/PnLCard.tsx:63-83`, `address/StakingTable.tsx:152`, `address/staking/StakingTableContent.tsx:163-248`, `market/token/TokenCard.tsx:62-163` (note: `red-400`/`green-400` tick is a *different* palette family than the file's own emerald/rose — internally inconsistent), `TradingViewChart.tsx:484-624` (DOM toolbar/OHLC, not canvas — carve-out does NOT apply), `tradingViewChart/ToolbarStat.tsx:13-19`, `perpDex/PerpDexTable.tsx:45-110` + `PerpDexMarketsTable.tsx:44-139`, tracker `TopTradersPreview.tsx:58-70` + `assets/AssetsSection.tsx:73` + `fills/WalletRecentFillsSection.tsx:64-72` + `walletlists/WalletListSelector.tsx`/`WalletListContent.tsx:138`/`CreateListModal.tsx:71,145`, hip4 `Hip4MarketsChapter.tsx:36,146` (dynamic chapter — exemption does NOT apply) + `Hip4AssetTable.tsx:55`, `common/PriceChange.tsx:20-55` + `StatsCard.tsx:81-152` + `FormField.tsx:50` + `charts/ChartStates.tsx:66-71` (all medium→**low** per verdict — directional/error color policy).
- **`bg-white/x`/`bg-black/x` surface-opacity (not scrims) → `surface-2`/`base`** (collapse, pervasive): tracker `WalletTabs.tsx:283,312` (separators → `border-subtle`), `BuilderCoinBreakdown.tsx:60,134`, `BuilderUsersTable.tsx` + `BuilderIntelligenceUsersTable.tsx` + `BuilderSelector.tsx:63` (`rounded-2xl` + `bg-white/5`), `CustomizeSidebarModal.tsx:72,214` (`bg-black/20`, `hover:bg-white/10`), profile `page.tsx:297-395`, hip4 `Hip4ChapterShell.tsx:122` + ~11 sibling `bg-surface/20-90` panels + `Hip4CodeBlock.tsx:15` (`bg-black/40` code panel → `bg-base`) + `Hip4PageHeader.tsx:158`/`Hip4SubNav.tsx:34`/`Hip4OverviewChapter.tsx:112` (`bg-white/[0.02-0.04]`), `usdh/WalletConnectButton.tsx:26`, `common/charts/PeriodSelector.tsx:34,47` (aurora `bg-black/30` + `bg-white/[0.06]`), `market/auction/AuctionChart.tsx:112,119` (→ `PillTabs`).
- **Radii `rounded-2xl/xl` on non-dialog surfaces → `rounded-lg`**: `address/AddressAnalyticsLayout.tsx:183` (+ `bg-surface/60`), `builders/[address]/page.tsx:108,162`, ecosystem `CreateListModal.tsx:55,104` (but `tailwind.config:120` keeps `rounded-xl`=12px as the *modal* radius — only the inner sub-elements need `rounded-lg`; the `bg-white/5` chip is the real defect), `common/modal/FormModal.tsx:72` (redundantly re-asserts `rounded-2xl` the ui/dialog already supplies).
- **`brand-primary` undefined-token** also at the two hip4 files above (medium) — listed there.
- `landing/SectionsEditorialPremium.tsx:110,279` — `text-white` CTA labels (siblings use `text-text-primary`).
- `xp/DailyTasksPopover.tsx:85-190` — `emerald` completed-state where the same file uses `text-success` at L71 (visible inconsistency).
- `common/charts/PeriodSelector.tsx:11,68-71` — **dead `variant="rose"` branch** (0 callers) — drop the union member (dual-category: dead-code + off-palette).
- `ecosystem` validation-hint `emerald/amber` ternary repeated 3× (`ImpactTab.tsx:42,79`, `ProjectTab.tsx:71`) → `success`/`gold`; consider a shared `<CharCountHint>`. Plus `TeamTab.tsx:127` (rose), `PreviewTab.tsx:118` (yellow → gold), `ProjectTab.tsx:180-239` (`text-white` on X icons).
- `xp/XpLeaderboard.tsx:73-94` — `amber` medals where `text-gold` exists (header Trophy already uses `text-gold`); `from-zinc-400/10` silver chrome.
- `wiki/CategorySidebar.tsx:109,155` + `CategoryFilter.tsx:139,169` — checkbox checked fill `border-white/80 bg-white/90` with a `text-brand-text-on` check (implies a `brand` fill).
- `ecosystem/project/ProjectModal.tsx:219-258` + `publicgoods/ProjectFormModal.tsx:366-451` — repeated inline `rgba(255,255,255,0.1)` scrollbar style ×3/×6; `bg-black/20` TabsList (sibling uses `bg-base`). *(Both `rounded-2xl` dialog sub-claims rejected — match the base dialog default; medium→low scoped to the inline rgba/bg-black.)*

---

## Prioritized Remediation Plan

**Baseline (cite up top):** `pnpm run lint` green · tsc/`pnpm run build` green · `knip` clean (but `common/**` is an entry point and masks `FormModal`/`DataTable`/`StatsPanel`/`ScrollableTable`). One unlisted dep (`postcss-load-config`). None of these gates detect raw-palette classes, inline `rgba()`, or primitive reuse — which is where every HIGH lives.

### Phase 0 — HIGH ship-blockers (do first, mostly small)
1. `StakingTableContent.tsx:237` — illegible `bg-gold text-gold` badge → tinted pill. (1-line)
2. `PortfolioStats.tsx:184` — delete the fabricated `Last tx: 1h ago`. (1-line)
3. `landing/SectionsEditorialPremium.tsx:253` — replace the `📊` emoji placeholder. (small)
4. `AddWalletDialog.tsx:139` — fix the stale "5/5" → "25/25". (1-line)
5. Token sweeps on the worst single files: `ImportWalletsCSVDialog`, `ReviewModal`, `CsvUpload`, `AuctionCard`, `LiquidationsStatsCard`/`Chart`, `TwapTable` ramp.

### Phase 1 — Quick wins (mechanical, <1h each)
- **Formatter swaps:** `formatPrice` ×5, `formatFunding` ×3, `compactUsd` (PortfolioStats), drop 3 `date-fns` imports → `timeAgo`/`formatDate`. Pure import + delete.
- **`timeAgo` adoption** (XpHistoryList, ActiveUsersPreview, Hip4StalenessChip) — mind the `5m` vs `5m ago` output change.
- **Radius normalization:** `rounded-2xl/xl → rounded-lg` on non-dialog surfaces (the address/builders/tracker list above) + chart tooltips `rounded-xl → rounded-lg`.
- **`<Num>` sweep:** ~16 standalone-number files (exclude ModuleTableRow cells).
- **`<Skeleton>` sweep:** 17 `animate-pulse` blocks → `Skeleton`/`SkeletonCard`/`SkeletonGrid`; hand-rolled spinners → `InlineSpinner`/`LoadingState`.
- **Directional-color find/replace:** project-wide `emerald-*→success`, `rose-*→danger`, `amber/yellow→gold`, `green-500/emerald→success` copy-checks, `bg-white/x` hovers → `bg-surface-2`. High volume but mechanical; do per-cluster to keep diffs reviewable.
- **`brand-primary` undefined token** (2 hip4 files), `slate-500`/`zinc-*` raw colors, `bg-surface/N` opacity panels (hip4 cluster).
- **Knip dead-export delete sweep** (~74 entries) + add `postcss-load-config` to devDeps.
- **Single-file fixes:** `Header.customTitle` removal, `PeriodSelector` dead `rose` branch, `landing` `text-white` CTAs, `resource-status-config.ts` SSOT token fix (propagates).
- **`native confirm()` → `<DeleteConfirmDialog>`** in `UserManagement`.

### Phase 2 — Larger refactors (need a dedicated PR + review)
- **KpiRibbon migration** (6 hand-rolled strips) — straightforward but touches layout; verify each renders identically.
- **PillTabs/TimeframeTabs consolidation** (~8 selectors, several with framer-motion sliders) — incl. a small `PeriodSelector` icon-label prop extension and an OverviewModule action-slot for `LiveActivity`/`BridgeTransfers` before those card-heads can collapse.
- **OverviewModule card-head** for the 6 explorer/v4 cards (after the action-slot extension).
- **Builders column factory** — extract `builderColumns` across 4 tables (~546 → shared).
- **Table/primitive consolidation & dead-code removal (one PR):** delete `FormModal` (+ false JSDoc), remove legacy `DataTable` function + orphaned `ScrollableTable`, migrate the 1 `TokenIcon` + 2 `AssetLogo` consumers to `TokenAvatar`/`getTokenIconUrl` (→ single token-image primitive), re-implement `LiquidationsStatsCard` on `StatsCard` and delete `StatsPanel`, relocate `MultiSeriesAreaChart` → `common/charts/`.
- **WebSocket dedup** (`token`/`perpDex`/`hype` → `WebSocketClient`) — flagged medium-high-risk, intentionally deferred; schedule independently.
- **Service-hook migration** (6 GET hooks → `useDataFetching`, + wrap `submitResource` in `withErrorHandling`) — behavior-preserving but touches data flow; test polling/pagination.
- **Un-migrated detail pages** (transaction / perp / perpdex / spot error states → `PageHeader`/`Card`/`KpiRibbon`/`ErrorState`) and tracker auth-gate/login modals → `<Dialog>`.

---

## Intentional / Accepted (not defects)

Confirmed-present but correctly excluded from the defect lists:
- **Landing marketing surface** — `rounded-2xl` cards/buttons, translucent glassmorphism (`bg-white/x`, `bg-surface/40`), header scrim: deliberate bespoke landing aesthetic, non-(app) route.
- **`bg-gold/bg-brand text-black` solid-accent CTAs** — repo-wide convention (InfoCard, ImportWalletsCSVDialog, etc.); canonical `text-brand-text-on` exists but fixing in isolation is out of scope.
- **Full-screen scrims** `bg-black/60` — `Sidebar.tsx:145` mobile nav overlay, `ui/dialog.tsx:24` — explicitly allowed.
- **Live-status `animate-pulse` dots** (`bg-success`) — `AuctionsPanel:286`, `NetworkPulse:111`, `LiveActivity:66`, Hip4 live dots — liveness cues, not skeletons.
- **`MultiSeriesAreaChart` location** — documented exception (lives in dashboard/chart, usable outside); tooltip is canonical. *(Relocation is an optional tidy, listed under Phase 2.)*
- **Chart-canvas colors** — `TradingViewChart` series/crosshair/glow `rgba()`, AuroraAreaChart ticks via `chartColors`: documented chart carve-out, lint green.
- **`Hip4DeployersComingSoon`** brand/gold gradient placeholder — all tokens, intentional pending-feature treatment.
- **Static-by-design HIP-4 educational chapters** (`Hip4EventsChapter`, `Hip4PageHeader`, `Hip4Callout`, `Hip4OverviewChapter`, `Hip4MechanicsChapter`) — off-palette literals exempt while content is stale-by-design (the live `Hip4MarketsChapter` errors are NOT exempt — flagged above).
- **XP gamification multi-hue coding** — `XpHistoryList` ACTION_COLORS, `XpBadge`/`DailyTasksWidget`/`WeeklyChallengesCard`/`XpEarnGuide` gold→purple/orange gradients, `XpNotification` celebration toast, profile orange streak pill — documented gamification exception.
- **`ui/**` base primitive chrome** — `tooltip:22 text-white`, `dialog:24/41/47` overlay+`rounded-2xl`+`bg-surface/95`+`text-white`, `switch`/`progress` `bg-white/10`, `select`/`sonner`: documented ui/ exception (radius/opacity primitive-level). *(`ui/copy-button`/`ui/address-display` emerald checks are NOT chrome — real swaps, flagged LOW.)*
- **Common-primitive CTAs** — `DeleteConfirmDialog` `bg-danger text-white`, `UserAccountCompact` `bg-action text-white`, `SidebarToggle` ghost `hover:bg-white/5`: accepted white-on-colored / ghost-variant alignment.
- **`TokenIcon` light variant**, **tracker `assets/hooks/index.ts` empty barrel**, **`useXp` auth/mutation orchestration**, **services `Record<string, any>` adapters** (×2, trivial `unknown` swap available), **WebSocket dedup** — all flagged intentional/deferred.
- **AddressCards explorer 3-card summary** — documented product layout, correctly NOT forced onto KpiRibbon; live, not dead.
- **`profile/page.tsx:143` Privy Twitter `<Image>`**, **landing `hsl()` identicon**, **AddressHero `hsl()` gradient** — user/deterministic avatars, not token logos; TokenAvatar does not apply.
